name: Double Chocolate Chip Cookies
recipeInstructions:
1. Beat the brown sugar and margarine together until light and fluffy.
2. Add the vanilla and egg white, beating well after each addition.
3. Gradually add the flour, cocoa, baking soda, and salt, stirring just until blended.
4. Stir in the chocolate chips.
5. Place spoonfuls of dough onto sheets sprayed with Pam cooking spray.
6. Bake at 375°F (190°C) for 8 to 9 minutes.
7. Allow the cookies to cool on the sheets for 1 minute before transferring them to a wire rack.
